blue_oceans.notes: 318K swimming community. Apps are workout generators or lap trackers. No app gamifies the daily stroke-improvement habit (one drill, one breath pattern, one kick drill) with streak/XP.
1.35M tennis community. Apps are AI video analysis or match trackers. No dedicated daily serve/rally habit streak app with XP progression for recreational tennis players building consistency.

930K golf community. Apps are GPS/scorecard tools for on-course use. Zero apps gamify the daily off-course practice habit (one chipping drill, one putting rep, one mental rehearsal) with streak/XP for handicap improvement.

750K BJJ community. Apps are instructional video libraries or generic timers. No app gamifies the daily BJJ practice habit (one submission drill, one positional rep, one guard retention sequence) with streak/XP + belt progression.

520K Arabic learning community. Duolingo covers Arabic generally. No dedicated app gamifies the daily Arabic script mastery habit (one letter form drill, one word calligraphy rep, one diacritics quiz) with streak/XP for script-specific learners.

690K Korean learning community. Duolingo/Pimsleur cover Korean generally. No dedicated app gamifies the daily Hangul mastery habit (one syllable block, one stroke-order drill, one reading speed rep) with streak/XP for script-focused learners.

675K sales community. Apps are CRM and outbound tools. Zero apps gamify the daily cold-email skill-building habit (one subject line test, one objection drill, one follow-up frame) with streak/XP for SDR skill development.

735K negotiation/sales community. Apps are podcasts or course platforms. Zero apps gamify the daily negotiation skill habit (one BATNA exercise, one framing drill, one anchoring rep) with streak/XP for practitioners.

4M personal finance community (r/personalfinance + r/fi). Apps are budget trackers or brokerages. Zero apps gamify the daily financial literacy habit (one concept, one calculation drill, one scenario quiz) with streak/XP for financial skill building.

occupied.notes: 255K community. Lingvano (4.7, 15K reviews) has daily streak feature and ASL/BSL. Not purely dominated — Lingvano is freemium and not laser-focused on micro-niche streak gamification — but competition exists.

685K community. HelloChinese (4.7, 185K reviews) covers Mandarin with some streak features. Pleco is the power-user gold standard. Gap: no micro-niche app specifically gamifying daily TONE mastery (4 tones + neutral) with XP.
228K community. Speeko (4.7, 28K) has daily lessons, Orai has AI feedback. Gap still exists for pure micro-niche streak-gamification but competition is real. Not blue ocean.
720K community. Breathwrk, Oak, Wim Hof Method all have streak features. Space is real but competitive. Multiple paid apps with streaks exist — SOFT_COMPETITION not blue ocean.
1.12M community. Wim Hof has streak. IceMan and Cold Turkey are dedicated cold shower streak apps. Space is genuinely competitive with multiple streak-specific apps.

1.1M journaling community. Gratitude (4.9, 95K), Five Minute Journal (4.8, 112K), Reflectly (4.7, 78K) all have dedicated streak systems. OCCUPIED — multiple paid apps with strong ratings and large review counts.
